dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, DID YOU SEE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: PEOPLE LOOK OVER THEIR SHOULDERS:

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: FEEL THEIR GAZES:

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW, THAT GIRL IS SO PRETTY. SHE HAS SUCH A PERFECT BODY.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: I'M SO USED TO PEOPLE WHISPERING ABOUT ME.

dialogue.speaker: STRANGER
dialogue.line: EXCUSE ME.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: YES?

dialogue.speaker: STRANGER
dialogue.line: I'VE BEEN WATCHING YOU FOR A BIT AND I LIKE YOUR STYLE. COULD I HAVE YOUR NUMBER?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: AH, NO, SORRY.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: HOW MANY TIMES HAVE GUYS ASKED ME FOR MY NUMBER TODAY?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: WHO AM I, YOU ASK?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A UNIVERSALLY RECOGNIZED GODDESS

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH, SHE'S BACK!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: I'LL HAVE A CHOCOLATE FRAPPUCCINO WITH WHIPPED CREAM, PLEASE.

dialogue.speaker: BARISTA
dialogue.line: SURE!

dialogue.speaker: BARISTA
dialogue.line: THE GODDESS IS HERE! YOUR DRINK IS READY!

dialogue.speaker: BARISTA
dialogue.line: IS THIS ENOUGH WHIPPED CREAM?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: THANK YOU! HAVE A NICE DAY~

dialogue.speaker: BARISTA
dialogue.line: COME AGAIN! I MEAN, HAVE A NICE DAY!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: I'M KIND OF USED TO PEOPLE BEING FRIENDLY.

dialogue.speaker: FRIEND
dialogue.line: OH, OVER HERE, JUGYEONG!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: AW, WOONGI, THANKS FOR SAVING ME A SEAT~

dialogue.speaker: FRIEND
dialogue.line: LOOK AT ALL THAT WHIPPED CREAM! THAT GUY WORKING AT THE CAFE DEFINITELY WANTS TO GO OUT WITH YOU!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: NO WAY.

dialogue.speaker: FRIEND
dialogue.line: OH RIGHT, THAT PICTURE YOU POSTED TODAY IS INSANE. I CAN'T BELIEVE HOW MANY LIKES YOU GOT!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: AH, THAT?

dialogue.speaker: FAN
dialogue.line: SO PRETTY

dialogue.speaker: FAN
dialogue.line: WHAT GODDESS..

dialogue.speaker: FRIEND
dialogue.line: I CAN'T BELIEVE MY FRIEND IS AN INSTA-STAR~ WHAT DOES IT FEEL LIKE TO BE A PRETTY GIRL?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: AWW, YOU SILLY.

dialogue.speaker: FAN
dialogue.line: DO YOU HAVE A BOYFRIEND?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: ACTUALLY, I CHECKED MY INBOX YESTERDAY AND THERE WAS A MESSAGE FROM XX HAN.

dialogue.speaker: FRIEND
dialogue.line: REALLY?! OH MY GOD! OH, THE LIFE OF A POPULAR GIRL!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: IT FEELS WEIRD. I GUESS YOU COULD SAY THAT I'M USED TO BEING POPULAR.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: WHAT'S THIS? THE DEPARTMENT REPRESENTATIVE WANTS EVERYONE TO GET TOGETHER AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: WHAT A CREEP~ WHY DOES IT SEEM LIKE HE MAKES UP SOMETHING JUST SO WE CAN GATHER EVERY WEEK? JUST LET ME FIND A WAY TO SLIP AWAY.

dialogue.speaker: DRUNK GUY
dialogue.line: HEY~ JUGYEONG~! HAVE ANOTHER GLASS~~~

dialogue.speaker: DRUNK GUY
dialogue.line: YOU HAVEN'T EVEN BEEN ANSWERING MY TEXTS LATELY~ YOU'VE CHANGED~ YOU'VE CHANGED~

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THERE HE GOES AGAIN WITH JUGYEONG. ALWAYS LIKE THE FIRST TIME.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: YOU'VE HAD TOO MUCH DRINK.

dialogue.speaker: DRUNK GUY
dialogue.line: I'M OKAY~~ I'M SO SOBER NOW THAT I'M NEXT TO YOU, JUGYEONG~~

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: OF COURSE, BEING PRETTY ISN'T ALWAYS NECESSARILY A GOOD THING.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH MY GOODNESS, YOU'RE SO PRETTY!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: I KNOW I'M SO PRETTY! IT ALWAYS FEELS NEW. BEING PRETTY IS THE BEST! BUT I DON'T EXACTLY HATE PEOPLE COMPLIMENTING ME EITHER.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: MOM, I'M HOME~

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: I NEED TO TAKE A SHOWER.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: OH, I DIDN'T UPDATE MY SOCIAL MEDIA TODAY. I BETTER DO IT NOW. I ALMOST FELL ASLEEP.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: THIS CAFE BATHROOM IS LIKE MY OWN PHOTO ZONE.

dialogue.speaker: FAN
dialogue.line: SO PRETTY

dialogue.speaker: FAN
dialogue.line: INSANELY PRETTY

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: WOW, 700 LIKES AS SOON AS I POSTED IT.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: YOU KNOW, BEING ME, IT'S PRETTY SWEET.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: BUT ONLY UNTIL I WASH OFF MY MAKEUP. AHH, THAT FEELS BETTER!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG
dialogue.line: HI THERE, I'M JUGYEONG, 21 YEARS OLD.

summary: JUGYEONG is introduced as a popular 'goddess' who constantly receives compliments and attention, especially on social media, even getting a message from a K-Pop idol. She enjoys the perks of her beauty but reveals that her 'true beauty' is only maintained with makeup, which she washes off at the end of the day.
